_comment: Project-level MCP servers for Claude Code. This file IS committed to git, but secrets are NEVER stored here — use ${VAR} references and put the real values in a local .env (gitignored) or export them in your shell.

mongodb._comment: Read-only MongoDB Atlas access scoped to voxel_db. Provisioned with the 'claude-code-readonly' Atlas user + readAnyDatabase role + MDB_MCP_READ_ONLY=true as a belt-and-braces lock. Used for debugging queries against feed_products / media_files without round-tripping through the backend.
